feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to consume SOAP read API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" in SAP? CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working on a SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public edition implementation project (version 2402)

Anyone can help me test and consume this API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2, from POSTMAN?

https://api.sap.com/api/CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2/overview

As per my understanding, this is an outbound API that allows to read production order data upon release, but we are not able to execute it yet. 

The request in Postman should be something like: https://host:port/ManufacturingOrderExecuteRequest_Out_V2? or just https://host:port/ as mentioned in API reference website?

In both cases, what should be added in the request body please to be able to retrieve data for one given Production Order? 

We tried first using the OData "Production Order V2" API https://api.sap.com/api/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/overview, but it was not sufficient for our requirement (for instance, this API does not retrieve the inspection lot information for a production order)

entry.title: Can we add more decimal places for invoices and quantities in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My questions here is twofold:

1) Is it possibles to have decimal places for quantities where we have up to 5 digits after comma?

2) Is it possible to have material prices with 6 digits after the comma? Also showing up like this on invoices etc.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud TDD Scope Item Activation 6W3
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
we are currently trying to activate the scope item 6W3 in our TDD system. Our Problem is that we cant find it during scoping in the CBC. After doing some research we found a spread sheet from SAP, which list the following scope items under the "Required Scope Items and Business Conditions" for 6W3. 
"6W1; 6W2; BD9; BME; 5D2; 5HP"
Does this mean we have to activate these scope items in our system before we can add 6w3 ?
We greatly appreciate any help.

Kind regards
Lukas

entry.title: Display XML data for output forms in public cloud for forms displayed using Create Correspondence
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have code "#&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#" that we can use to display the xml data for forms that are displayed using output configuration but there are few forms that are displayed via std. apps or create correspondence like FI forms, COA forms and so on

Do we have any way that we can check the xml data for these forms as well?

entry.title: Copy Inspection Results - Data selection procedure 300 is not accepted
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have a requirement to copy inspection results from one lot to another in sap s/4 hana public edition, where in "selection procedure" - it is restricted to 100 and 200 only i am unable to set it to 300.

How to make selection procedure set to 300?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to call Asynchronous SOAP Web service from ABAP class in S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a business requirement to create Main assets in S4 HANA public cloud system(2402), from a custom RAP implementation class.

we have created  the required Communication arrangements in S4 public cloud ( Communication user/system/arrangements) for communication scenario SAP_COM_0563.Outbound service also active in the comm arrangement.

We have tested this SOAP service using SOAP UI tool and its working fine and Assets documents are also getting created in the system.

But We are trying to use the same SOAP API from custom class from eclipse after we creating the service consumption model. and we are getting an error stating "Logical Port does not belong to consumer proxy".

Followed the steps mentioned in this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-soap-web-services..html

SOAP API - used : https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview

Could some one please suggest us how to resolve this, or please suggest the correct approach to be followed to consume the SOAP Web service from custom ABAP class.

entry.title: How to change Material and Serial Number in Equipment master
entry.content:
Once equipment is saved Material and Serial number fields are disabling and not allowing to change the material and serial number.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage WorkForce API Access in S/4 HANA Public Edition
entry.content:
Greetings,

I'm currently developing a mobile application using APPGyver and need to integrate specific Workforce/Employee data.

While I've encountered a forum post - [Click Here] - that mentions a dedicated CDS View for employee information, it lacks certain data fields I require. Specifically, I'm searching for:

• Field 1: Manager of the Employee

• Field 2: Cost Center of the Employee

Any guidance or direction to access these fields would be greatly appreciated.

 

Regards

Rahul Jain

entry.title: How to install Analysis for MS Office on Windows
entry.content:
I would like to use Analysis for MS Office, however I am looking for installer in softwarecenter and I don't found it


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Electronic bank statement - change in transformation
entry.content:
Hello!

We are setting up electronic bank statment for a Swedish customer in SAP public cloud. The EBS-format is Camt053 extended and includes bankgiro-payments (local Swedish payments). The bankgiro-payments are presented in the Camt053 files as a lump-sum on the Ntry-level and details related to the lump-sum are presented on the Ntry-details level. The transformation reads the lump-sum instead of the detail amounts of each separate payment which leads to the payments not being posted or matched to invoices on a customer account in SAP. We would like to change the transformation and make it read the transactions details of the bankgiro-payments instead of the lump-sum. This change is only relevant for bankgiro payments, other payments should be read as they are today. We have previously done this change in SAP on premise for other customers but we are not sure if it is possible to do it in public cloud. Does anyone have any experience or inputs regarding this?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Electronic bank statement - change in transformation
entry.content:
Hello!

We are setting up electronic bank statment for a Swedish customer in SAP public cloud. The EBS-format is Camt053 extended and includes bankgiro-payments (local Swedish payments). The bankgiro-payments are presented in the Camt053 files as a lump-sum on the Ntry-level and details related to the lump-sum are presented on the Ntry-details level. The transformation reads the lump-sum instead of the detail amounts of each separate payment which leads to the payments not being posted or matched to invoices on a customer account in SAP. We would like to change the transformation and make it read the transactions details of the bankgiro-payments instead of the lump-sum. This change is only relevant for bankgiro payments, other payments should be read as they are today. We have previously done this change in SAP on premise for other customers but we are not sure if it is possible to do it in public cloud. Does anyone have any experience or inputs regarding this?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Periodic billing of service products
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My goal is to set up a periodic billing plan for a service product.

In the basic configuration of the system, only the billing plan type "SD Baseline Milestone Billing" is available in the case of the standard order (OR).

Furthermore, it is not possible in CBC to assign further invoicing plan types to the document type mentioned.

Is there an approach with which a periodic invoicing plan can be implemented in the system?

I look forward to your feedback.

Best regards

Sebastian

entry.title: Purchase contract for enhanced limit in S4HC
entry.content:
Hello,

we would like to use purchase contracts for enhanced limit items, however we did not find a possibility to enter the item category enhanced limit in the purchase contracts.

We are on a S4Hana Cloud system.

 

Thanks and BR

Mona

entry.title: How to use Revision Level to segregate inventory of a material and use accordingly in production ?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Our customer is using revision levels (material index) to track technical evolution of materials.

On S/4hana cloud public, we are wondering how to achieve this using the standard Revision Level function which does not seem to have any impact on any process (purchasing, production & planning, inventory receipts or shipments, stock management). Is it only an information that cannot be leveraged at any point?

We have considered using batches but this would require important changes for the new field creation and dislay on every single relevant areas/business objects. Also products that are not batch-managed cannot use this solution (e.g.: small screws).

For the record, I found this simliar question which is not very recent so I'm try anyway (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-can-we-differentiate-between-stock-on-basis-of-revision-level/qaq-p/12553152)

Thanks in advance for your inputs, thoughts or experiences.

Adrien

entry.title: Revaluation of a purchase order price due to a material price change
entry.content:
We need to run a revaluation of a purchase order due to a material price change. This works in the company currency but does not work in a functional currency different to the company currency, using the MRNB transaction ( yes it exists in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition!)

The material currency is the company currency. The PO is in the functional currency (which is different to the company currency).

The business scenario is that the amount we pay for the product (sucrose from sugar cane) changes every quarter and we need to back pay the suppliers for sucrose supplied prior to the change in price. 

 

Any ideas, work aorunds or suggestions as to another method of achieving this result?

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility 

SAP S/4HANA 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to maintain a price for Project member's timesheet(maybe defined a price every hour)
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We use "manage my timesheet"  APP to calculate Human resource worktime for a WBS. I want to know, in which App we can define a price or cost for their timesheet every hour?

And at start, project manager will assign a demand hour value for every member, does this price will also works in the demand hour?

Thanks

entry.title: SAP13 Customer Statement (Data Source Extensions)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone!

We have this requiremnts that include a standard field in the SAP13 Correspondence. Can we extend the data source of the SAP13 Correspondence (Customer Statement)? If yes how? Unlike Correspondence SAP09 we can modify and extend the fields in the data source usring Custom field and logic App.

Thank You!

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud / Implementation of Express Delivery Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
we have the requirement to check if its possible to implement Express Delivery Service in a Public Cloud setting. Specifically our customer wants to send their products to their customers via UPS or DHL. They also want to be able to assign DHL or UPS to a sales order or shipment. 
I am new to this topic and i would appreciate any help on how or even if we can implement this in the Public cloud.
Thanks for all responses in advance.

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: How to read AIF logs from ABAP code(RAP) in S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement to fetch the log messages from AIF Message dashboard app on S4 HANA public cloud.

We are developing a custom report using RestFul ABAP (RAP ) and we are stuck at a place how to read the error log messages for an asynchronous API to know the status of Asset created in the system.

( API- https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview )

We are able to see the AIF logs in the message monitoring( Message dashoard ) fiori apps, but the same AIF message we would want to fetch into custom ABAP RAP code.

Could not find relevant information on the community , hence posting this question.

Appreciate if some one  provide a solution how to achieve this.

regards,

Kumar

entry.title: Enter a Reference for NF in PO tab or Material tab error
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm executing the BFH test (Asset Under Construction) and the script asked me to use the I0 tax option at the step Post Acquisition (Integrated AP) Without Purchase Order. This I0 option doesn't exist, so I tried to move forward using the 00 tax option to finish my supplier invoice, but it ends with this error:

I don't have a PO to mention because this process is without it, my reference is just the asset number.

How should I proceed?

Thanks in advance!
